name: The Grid AI

dataUsage.retentionPolicy: The Grid states that all instruments have zero data retention. Separately, its documentation says it records per-call usage data including timestamp, token counts, trade details, supplier information, and performance metrics for metering and dispute resolution.
dataUsage.details: API requests are routed to the lowest-cost qualifying provider/model that satisfies the instrument requirements, and The Grid records routing and metering data about each inference call.

notes: Primary-source review found product and API documentation but no publicly accessible privacy policy, DPA/AVV, sub-processor list, SCC statement, security certification page, or clear headquarters disclosure on the provider website/docs. The strongest confirmed privacy-relevant facts are that requests are dynamically routed across qualifying suppliers, the app claims zero data retention for instruments, and the docs confirm retention of usage/metering metadata per inference call.
